description: Please come and join Dishari for a relaxed summer outing at a state park.
Bring your family and friends and your favorite games for a day of fun, laughter, and connection while enjoying the live cooking of mouthwatering Indian dishes onsite.
Menu
Breakfast (Served until 12:30 pm EST)
Luchi (Fresh Onsite), Aloor Tarkari, Bonde (sweet), Summer Fruits Mocktail
Lunch (Served until 3:00pm EST)
Saada Bhaat, Daal, Jhuri aloo bhaja, Mutton Curry  (cooked Onsite), Paneer Curry (Veg only), Chutney, Papad, Mishti Doi
KIDS Food – All Day
Noodles, Pasta
Evening Snacks (4-5PM)
Tea, Jhalmuri
Please use the form below to register for the picnic.
Please note that, although no registration fee is needed for kids under 5 years, you need to include them for head count purposes (state park requirement).
Once registered, you will receive details of the venue and parking information via email.
We look forward to seeing you at the picnic.
AGOMONI – THE RISING
Dishari is proud to unveil its MEGA EVENT of 2026, Agomoni - The Rising
A spectacular celebration where tradition meets transformation, and culture rises in all its glory
Prepare yourself for an unforgettable evening of never seen before and soul-stirring performances.
This is NOT JUST AN EVENT - THIS IS AGOMONI—reborn, reimagined, and rising.
The countdown to the rise begins now….Stay tuned, more information to follow soon.

Dishari proudly invites you to be part of “Mahishasurmardini – Reimagined” — an electrifying celebration of Shakti through the powerful blend of tradition and contemporary dance featuring Kumar Sharma.
This is a golden opportunity to learn and perform with one of the most dynamic dancers of recent times.
REGISTRATION PACKAGE Includes:
• Three virtual mentoring sessions
• One exclusive in-person mentoring session
• Stage performance with Kumar Sharma
• Admission to Agomoni 2026
🎟 Early Bird Offer: $99 only till April 30th.
✨ Spots are limited — REGISTER NOW !!
